name: smurfing
definition: Multiple individuals make coordinated cash deposits each below CTR threshold, collectively exceeding it

name: dormant_activation
definition: Controller reactivates dormant mule accounts which then burst payments back

name: cash_intensive
definition: Business deposits cash volumes exceeding declared annual turnover

name: micro_structuring
definition: Many depositors each make small cash deposits well below CTR threshold

name: geo_smurfing
definition: Regional depositors in distinct geographic areas converge proceeds to same beneficiaries

name: layering
definition: Rapid transfers across accounts and jurisdictions obscuring origin

name: chain_branch
definition: Sequential chain with fraction simultaneously fanned to branch accounts at each node

name: pass_through
definition: Controller funds pass-through accounts, each immediately forwarding 90-98% of received funds

name: split_merge
definition: Origin splits to N intermediaries, each immediately forwarding to a single merger

name: circular_ring
definition: N accounts form an ordered ring through which funds circulate

name: mule_network
definition: Coordinated individuals sharing physical/digital infrastructure receive and forward funds

name: hub_network
definition: Peripheral accounts funnel to a central hub which immediately forwards proceeds

name: fanin_fanout
definition: Aggregator collects from multiple sources then redistributes to multiple destinations

name: funnel_account
definition: Account aggregates funds from many sources then rapidly forwards to few destinations; near-zero balance

name: burst_transfers
definition: Single origin fans out rapid payments to multiple receivers within a burst window

name: round_tripping
definition: Funds leave a beneficial owner, travel through intermediaries, and return to a different account

name: loan_back
definition: Criminal lends laundered funds to themselves through a shell entity to create legitimate income

name: gambling_wash
definition: Illicit funds converted to gambling chips and cashed out as winnings

name: ghost_payroll
definition: Fictitious employees receive payroll transfers that are immediately consolidated

name: atm_cashout_ring
definition: Compromised card data used for coordinated ATM withdrawals across multiple locations

name: crypto_gateway
definition: Fiat funds converted to cryptocurrency via exchange, layered on-chain, then cashed out

name: insurance_cycling
definition: Rapid premium payments and policy surrenders used to cycle funds through insurer

name: tbml_invoice
definition: Trade-based money laundering via over/under-invoiced import-export transactions

name: hawala_mirror
definition: Informal value transfer mirrored by offsetting domestic transactions

name: crypto_atm_withdrawal
definition: Crypto ATM used to convert crypto to cash with minimal KYC

name: exchange_micro_structuring
definition: Small crypto exchange purchases structured to avoid reporting thresholds

name: p2p_fiat_roundtrip
definition: P2P platform used to cycle fiat through multiple accounts

name: crypto_salary_obfuscation
definition: Salary paid in crypto to obscure beneficial ownership of employment income

name: stablecoin_chain
definition: Stablecoins used to chain transfers across wallets before off-ramping

name: crypto_mining_wash
definition: Mining pool payouts used to launder proceeds as legitimate mining income

name: unlicensed_vasp
definition: Unlicensed virtual asset service provider processes high-volume crypto transfers

name: p2p_broker
definition: Informal broker matches buy/sell orders outside regulated exchange

name: unlicensed_msb
definition: Unlicensed money services business transmits funds across borders

name: gambling_rapid_cycling
definition: Rapid deposit/withdrawal cycles at online gambling platform

name: otc_desk
definition: Over-the-counter crypto desk facilitates large trades with minimal documentation
